92:2: وَ<tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed><tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َهَارِ إِذَا تَجَلَّىٰ
92:3: وَمَا خَلَقَ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=laam_shamsiyah>ل</tajweed>ذَّكَرَ وَ<tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْأُ<tajweed class=ikhafa>نث</tajweed>َىٰٓ
92:5: فَأَ<tajweed class=ghunnah>مّ</tajweed>َا مَنْ أَعْطَىٰ وَ<tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>تَّقَىٰ
92:8: وَأَ<tajweed class=ghunnah>مّ</tajweed>َا م<tajweed class=iqlab>َنۢ ب</tajweed>َخِلَ وَ<tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>سْتَغْنَىٰ
92:11: وَمَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُ مَالُهُ<tajweed class=madda_obligatory>ۥٓ</tajweed> إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
92:13: وَإِ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َ لَنَا لَلْأَخِرَةَ وَ<tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْأُولَىٰ
92:15: لَا يَصْلَ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ـٰ</tajweed>ه<tajweed class=madda_obligatory>َآ</tajweed> إِلَّا <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْأَشْقَى
92:19: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِ<tajweed class=ikhafa>ند</tajweed>َهُ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ۥ</tajweed> م<tajweed class=idgham_ghunnah>ِن ن</tajweed>ِّعْمَ<tajweed class=ikhafa>ةٍ ت</tajweed>ُ<tajweed class=qalaqah>جْ</tajweed>زَىٰٓ
92:20: إِلَّا <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed><tajweed class=qalaqah>بْ</tajweed>تِغ<tajweed class=madda_obligatory>َا</tajweed>ٓءَ وَ<tajweed class=qalaqah>جْ</tajweed>هِ رَبِّهِ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْأَعْلَىٰ
